'''ât-ch-w''' ('''katachaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbewilder|unbewilder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbewilder|unbewilder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-ch-w
|-
! Lemma
| katachaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitachaw|thitachaw]] || [[word:jitachaw|jitachaw]] || [[word:shitachaw|shitachaw]] || [[word:kitachaw|kitachaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutachaw|thuthutachaw]] || [[word:jujutachaw|jujutachaw]] || [[word:shushutachaw|shushutachaw]] || [[word:kukutachaw|kukutachaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutachaw|thutachaw]] || [[word:jutachaw|jutachaw]] || [[word:shutachaw|shutachaw]] || [[word:kutachaw|kutachaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutachaw|thutachaw]] || [[word:jutachaw|jutachaw]] || [[word:shutachaw|shutachaw]] || [[word:kutachaw|kutachaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetachaw|thetachaw]] || [[word:jetachaw|jetachaw]] || [[word:shetachaw|shetachaw]] || [[word:ketachaw|ketachaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotachaw|thothotachaw]] || [[word:jojotachaw|jojotachaw]] || [[word:shoshotachaw|shoshotachaw]] || [[word:kokotachaw|kokotachaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotachaw|thotachaw]] || [[word:jotachaw|jotachaw]] || [[word:shotachaw|shotachaw]] || [[word:kotachaw|kotachaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotachaw|thotachaw]] || [[word:jotachaw|jotachaw]] || [[word:shotachaw|shotachaw]] || [[word:kotachaw|kotachaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtachaw|thĂŠtachaw]] || [[word:jĂŠtachaw|jĂŠtachaw]] || [[word:shĂŠtachaw|shĂŠtachaw]] || [[word:kĂŠtachaw|kĂŠtachaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatachaw|thathatachaw]] || [[word:jajatachaw|jajatachaw]] || [[word:shashatachaw|shashatachaw]] || [[word:kakatachaw|kakatachaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatachaw|thatachaw]] || [[word:jatachaw|jatachaw]] || [[word:shatachaw|shatachaw]] || [[word:katachaw|katachaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatachaw|thatachaw]] || [[word:jatachaw|jatachaw]] || [[word:shatachaw|shatachaw]] || [[word:katachaw|katachaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatachaw|shatachaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatachaw|goshatachaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatachaw|gokishatachaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatachawnĂŒ|shatachawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatachawnknĂŒ|goshatachawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatachawnĂŒ|gokishatachawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatachawshĂ«|shatachawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatachawnkshĂ«|goshatachawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatachawshĂ«|gokishatachawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatachawro|shatachawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatachawnkro|goshatachawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatachawro|gokishatachawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatachawmu|shatachawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatachawnkmu|goshatachawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatachawmu|gokishatachawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatachawsher|shatachawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatachawnksher|goshatachawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatachawsher|gokishatachawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatachawng|shatachawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatachawnkng|goshatachawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatachawng|gokishatachawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatachawya|shatachawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatachawnkya|goshatachawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatachawya|gokishatachawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatachawyam|shatachawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatachawnkyam|goshatachawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatachawyam|gokishatachawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatachawnĂŒshĂ«|shatachawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatachawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatachawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatachawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatachawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatachawnĂŒro|shatachawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatachawnknĂŒro|goshatachawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatachawnĂŒro|gokishatachawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatachawnĂŒmu|shatachawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatachawnknĂŒmu|goshatachawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatachawnĂŒmu|gokishatachawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatachawshĂ«nĂŒ|shatachawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatachawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatachawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatachawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatachawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatachawshĂ«ro|shatachawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatachawnkshĂ«ro|goshatachawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatachawshĂ«ro|gokishatachawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatachawshĂ«mu|shatachawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatachawnkshĂ«mu|goshatachawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatachawshĂ«mu|gokishatachawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatachawronĂŒ|shatachawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatachawnkronĂŒ|goshatachawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatachawronĂŒ|gokishatachawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatachawroshĂ«|shatachawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatachawnkroshĂ«|goshatachawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatachawroshĂ«|gokishatachawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatachawromu|shatachawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatachawnkromu|goshatachawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatachawromu|gokishatachawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatachawmunĂŒ|shatachawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatachawnkmunĂŒ|goshatachawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatachawmunĂŒ|gokishatachawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatachawmushĂ«|shatachawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatachawnkmushĂ«|goshatachawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatachawmushĂ«|gokishatachawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatachawmuro|shatachawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatachawnkmuro|goshatachawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatachawmuro|gokishatachawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
